title: Extempore Pinned On A Lady's Couch.
content:
If you rattle along like your mistress's tongue,
            Your speed will outrival the dart:
        But, a fly for your load, you'll break down on the road
            If your stuff has the rot, like her heart.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Burns, titled "Extempore Pinned On A Lady's Couch.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
